大发导师聊天室计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238994463_63339031<br>vk.com/topic-238916965_63036188<br>vk.com/topic-238994460_64223096<br>vk.com/topic-238994461_64792491<br>vk.com/topic-238994457_64577897<br>vk.com/topic-238994459_63917881<br>vk.com/topic-238965129_63917988<br>vk.com/topic-238994455_63036272<br>vk.com/topic-238994481_64792617<br>vk.com/topic-238994470_64223299<br>vk.com/topic-238953258_63645250<br>vk.com/topic-238994599_63918105<br>vk.com/topic-238994458_63645252<br>vk.com/topic-238994597_64578249<br>vk.com/topic-238994445_63036391<br>vk.com/topic-238994479_63918193<br>vk.com/topic-238951204_63122521<br>vk.com/topic-238994468_63645396<br>vk.com/topic-238994449_63918202<br>vk.com/topic-238981559_63918339<br>vk.com/topic-238916965_63036670<br>vk.com/topic-238994472_63735861<br>vk.com/topic-238994461_64793099<br>vk.com/topic-238994452_63735819<br>vk.com/topic-238994595_63036683<br>vk.com/topic-238994450_64223667<br>vk.com/topic-238994586_63474036<br>vk.com/topic-238994483_63339728<br>vk.com/topic-238994475_63036861<br>vk.com/topic-238994457_64578451<br>vk.com/topic-238951569_63918648<br>vk.com/topic-238953258_63645779<br>vk.com/topic-238994451_64793147<br>vk.com/top
